data.title: Tesla Q3 Earnings Preview: Musk Has Questions To Answer, Traders 'Need To Buckle Up' For Volatile Stock Moves
data.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) could address key topics like its sub-$30,000 vehicle, the rollout timeline for its robotaxi, and other pressing questions from investors and analysts when it reports its third-quarter financial results after market close Wednesday.

Kamala Harris Urged To Address Cannabis Monopolies By Industry Pioneer Wanda James
data.description: Wanda James, the first Black person in the U.S. to receive a dispensary license, wants Kamala Harris to help break up the pot monopolies.

data.title: Amazon One Medical Launches AI Tools Aiming To Cut Over 17 Hours/Week Of Admin Tasks For Physicians
data.description: Amazon One Medical uses AI tools to reduce physician administrative work, allowing doctors to focus on patient care. Powered by AWS, these tools streamline workflows, improve patient communication, and enhance collaboration among care teams.
